title.en: Ye Tian explained, which made Xiao Yue feel at ...

content.en:
Terran.

Ye Tian came back with Ouyang Jiu'er, and this move attracted Xiao Yue's attention.

Ye Tian explained, which made Xiao Yue feel at ease.

And Ouyang Jiu'er was also arranged by Ye Tian in a mansion in his territory, not far from where he lived, which was also to prevent accidents, and also had the meaning of monitoring Ouyang Jiu'er.

After Ouyang Jiu'er settled in the Terran, he began to inquire about the situation of the Terran.

There are a lot of human races, and many human races know a little bit of information to a greater or lesser extent, and under the investigation again and again, Ouyang Jiu'er finally knows the situation of the human race and the general strength of the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

"The strength of the human race is very weak, there are not many true ancestors, the strongest one is the previous Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, many human races worship him very much, I estimate that he is at most a top true ancestor, not even so!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said secretly.

However, all of her information was found from some weak Terrans, and those Terrans didn't know much information, and the strong people who really knew the intelligence of the Terrans basically belonged to the True Monarch, Half-Step True Ancestor, and True Ancestor level.

But wouldn't she be stupid to go to a strong person above the True Monarch to understand the situation, wouldn't that be stupid?

However, when she learned that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm had a rule list that recorded the records of the Ancient Realm, she was immediately surprised.

She also knows a lot about the ancient realms, each of which has unique rules, but very few of the ancient realms will give birth to the ancient realm records, and all the ancient realms that can give birth to the ancient realm records have very high potential.

Through the records of the Ancient Realm recorded on the Xuanxu List, we can also roughly understand the approximate strength of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Thereupon.

Ouyang Jiu'er's consciousness extended to the Endless Void, found the Xuanxu List, and began to observe the records of the Ancient Realm.

Although there are many records in the ancient realm, for the true monarchs, they are also very quick to read.

However, she was shocked.

"That Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor actually created the records of the Four Great Ancient Realms, that kid is so talented?"

Ouyang Jiu'er was surprised.

The record of the strongest talent, the record of the strongest new true ancestor, the record of the strength of the strongest true ancestor, and the record of the strongest physique......

From these four records, it can be seen that Ye Tian is very powerful, and he is a real genius against the sky.

"It seems that I underestimated this Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, no wonder those people of the Terran worship him so much! Now it seems that the potential of the Terran is also good, and it is also a good plan to stay here for the time being. Besides, my identity is not ordinary, and most of the forces don't know about me, but some of the strongest Dao Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force may have heard of me, and if my identity is exposed, it will be a big trouble!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said secretly in his heart.

The Terrans are weak and have great potential, and they have a large population, so it is indeed a good way for her to hide in the Terrans, and it will not attract the attention of the Upper Triple Heaven forces.

In this way, Ouyang Jiu'er lived in the Terran Race, spending most of his time cultivating and occasionally communicating with the Terran Race.

It just so happened that Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue and Ye Yu were reincarnated and rebuilt, and now they are also at the level of True Monarch, Ouyang Jiu'er approached them and had a good relationship with them.

Because Ouyang Jiu'er understands everything, and occasionally can guide Xiao Yue and Ye Yu, their relationship is very good.

In this regard, Ye Tian did not stop it, besides, there was a half-step domain ancestor reincarnated powerhouse to guide his wife, this was also a big opportunity, he didn't need to stop it.

But the longer Ouyang Jiu'er stayed in the human race, Ye Tian was still a little worried.

So, on this day, he entered the small realm of the Wind King, wanting to find information about Ouyang Jiu'er from the various classic information of Black Wind Mountain.

But he was still disappointed!

The intelligence of a half-step domain ancestor is definitely an incomparably high-level secret, and if he can find out casually by a general, it will be too abnormal.

Not to mention him, even if he was a bloody general, he definitely didn't know Ouyang Jiu'er's information.

Maybe the remaining six kings of Black Wind Mountain knew a little bit of Ouyang Jiu'er's information, but the six kings were still asleep, and it was impossible for him to disturb the six kings.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of years have passed.

......

"The speed of cultivation is too slow!"

Ouyang Jiu'er frowned.

At the beginning, she was a half-step domain ancestor, and she had no choice but to use the secret technique to reincarnate, but she did not awaken her memory at first, and it was not until she reached the level of the Heavenly Monarch that she awakened her memory.

As a result, she has few resources and treasures.

As for Biqing's Immortal Coffin, it was the only treasure she found, and she had just been promoted to True Monarch at that time, but she never expected that the Battle of the Domain Realm would break out at that time.

The entire realm was shattered, and she almost fell unlucky.

Later, the Domain Fragment was thrown into the Dark Forbidden Realm by the Lord of the Domain.

The Dark Forbidden Domain is so terrifying, the Dao Ancestors will fall if they go deeper, although the power of the Dark Forbidden Domain will be weakened by half when it invades the domain boundary fragments, but it is not something that a true monarch can reach her.

The forces of the lower triple heavens basically can't stop the power of the dark taboo, and countless forces of the lower triple heavens have been annihilated, and only the middle triple heaven forces and the upper triple heaven forces can barely resist by opening various large arrays, secret arts, and a large number of resources.

But after countless years of arrival, many Dao Ancestors have fallen in order to protect the disciples in the sect.

Therefore, she could only protect herself with the help of Biqing Immortal Crystal and fell into a deep sleep.

It was precisely because of her sleep that she didn't have the opportunity to collect the resources of other forces at all, otherwise the domain boundary fragments of the resources everywhere could be obtained by looking for a huge amount of resources!

Without resources, no matter how talented she is, even if she is the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, there is no way to quickly improve her strength.

According to her cultivation speed, it would take a long time to promote to a half-step True Ancestor.

And the Xuanxu Ancient Realm had just been promoted, in such a prosperous world, how could she endure such a slow cultivation improvement!

"I hid a lot of treasures in the domain realm at the beginning, but in order to prevent others from finding them, I set up a lot of dangers, even the lowest danger treasure land, it is not something I can enter now!"

Ouyang Jiu'er was embarrassed.

Suddenly, she thought of Ye Tian.

Ye Tian looks very easy to speak, and his strength should not be weak, and at worst it is the top True Ancestor combat power, maybe it is still the strongest True Ancestor.

If you ask Ye Tian for help, you should be able to enter one of the treasure places and take out some of the resources.

"I just don't know if the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws is willing to help?"

Ouyang Jiu'er muttered.

Either way, she's going to give it a try.

So, she went to Ye Tian's palace.

------------

"Come in!"

Ye Tian happened to be in the palace residence of the human race, and the servants reported that someone had come to see him, and he immediately knew that it was Ouyang Jiu'er, so he asked Ouyang Jiu'er to come in.

"Ouyang Jiu'er, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

Ouyang Jiu'er smiled and said, "Brother Ye, call me Jiu'er, I want to come to you for a favor!"

Ye Tian was a little flustered, a half-step domain ancestor called him Brother Ye, could he not panic!

Of course, he has to be calm, otherwise it will not be good to be seen flawed.

But he didn't know that Ouyang Jiu'er didn't have any hole cards at all, otherwise he probably wouldn't have such a mentality.

"What's the busy?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Brother Ye, my father left me a resource in a certain secret realm, I want to go over and get it, but now my strength is too weak, and it is too dangerous to go there, so I want to ask you to help take me into that secret realm!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Why should I help? What's in it for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

Ouyang Jiu'er showed a look that was really like this, and she expected that Ye Tian would not be able to help in vain.

"I can get paid. Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Ordinary treasures, I can't look at them!" Ye Tian said.

"World Promotion Secret Technique, I think you should need it!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "I found that your human race is following the inner world flow, but after reaching the Heavenly Monarch level, the internal universe can only expand the area, strictly speaking, your human race does not have the inheritance above the Heavenly Monarch at all, and it is still the refining body flow and the divine power flow." If you have cultivated the World Advancement Secret Technique, you can make the universe in your body comparable to the Great Universe, and even comparable to the Dao Realm and the Ancient Realm. "

"And such a secret technique?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

In Black Wind Mountain, he hadn't even discovered such a secret technique!

"Of course there is such a secret technique!" Ouyang Jiu'er said proudly: "This is ...... A secret technique developed by my father. In fact, the people of the domain realm also don't pay much attention to the inner world, many world schools have specialized in cultivating the body flow and the divine power flow after reaching the true ancestor, although the internal world is still growing, but there is no substantial transformation, it is not a real world school! How about it, if you take me to that secret realm, I will hand over the first layer of the world promotion secret technique to you, which is enough for you to raise the inner world to a level comparable to the great universe! It will also improve your overall strength to a certain extent, at least the combat time will be longer!"

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He didn't think that a half-step domain ancestor would deceive him, so he didn't think it was fake.
